test_result.details: Strong Zipfian distribution (RÂ²=0.9084) and characteristic glyph entropy are consistent with a substitution cipher preserving the statistical structure of an underlying language; however, alternative explanations remain possible.

scored_hypotheses.claim: The manuscript's text structure reflects a single, coherent narrative.

test_result.test: claude_evaluation
test_result.details: High hapax ratio (70.1%) and low Zipf exponent (0.89) contradict single coherent narrative; both indicate fragmented vocabulary distribution and weak power-law structure typical of random or cipher text rather than integrated topic continuity.
